title: Property Consultant - Cushman & Wakefield India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Cushman & Wakefield India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!
